description: Unique identifier for each NFL game
transformation: Selected from raw schedules and kept unchanged

description: NFL season year
transformation: Selected from raw schedules

description: Regular season week number
transformation: Selected from raw schedules

description: Date of the game
transformation: Selected from raw schedules and stored as date

description: Away team abbreviation
transformation: Selected from raw schedules

description: Final score for away team
transformation: Selected from raw schedules

description: Home team abbreviation
transformation: Selected from raw schedules

description: Final score for home team
transformation: Selected from raw schedules

description: Days of rest for away team before game
transformation: Selected from raw schedules

description: Days of rest for home team before game
transformation: Selected from raw schedules

description: Team abbreviation for one team-game row
transformation: Created by reshaping each game into one row per team

description: Opponent team abbreviation
transformation: Created by reshaping each game into one row per team

description: Points scored by the team in that game
transformation: Created from home_score or away_score based on team role

description: Points allowed by the team in that game
transformation: Created from opponent score based on team role

description: Days of rest for the team before the game
transformation: Created from home_rest or away_rest based on team role

description: Indicator for whether team played at home (1=yes 0=no)
transformation: Created during home/away reshaping

description: Target outcome variable where 1=win and 0=loss
transformation: Created by comparing points_for and points_against

description: Number of offensive run and pass plays by team in game
transformation: Aggregated from filtered regular season offensive plays

description: Average offensive EPA per play for team in game
transformation: Mean EPA across filtered run and pass plays

description: Number of pass plays by team in game
transformation: Count of play_type equal to pass

description: Number of run plays by team in game
transformation: Count of play_type equal to run

description: Number of interceptions thrown by team in game
transformation: Summed from interception indicator

description: Number of lost fumbles by team in game
transformation: Summed from fumble_lost indicator

description: Share of offensive plays that were passes
transformation: Calculated as pass_plays divided by offensive_plays

description: Total turnovers committed by team in game
transformation: Calculated as interceptions_thrown plus fumbles_lost

description: Point differential for the game
transformation: Calculated as points_for minus points_against

description: Points scored in previous game by same team
transformation: Created using 1-game lag within each team

description: Points allowed in previous game by same team
transformation: Created using 1-game lag within each team

description: Previous game result for same team
transformation: Created using 1-game lag within each team

description: Previous game offensive EPA per play for same team
transformation: Created using 1-game lag within each team

description: Previous game turnovers for same team
transformation: Created using 1-game lag within each team

description: Previous game point differential for same team
transformation: Created using 1-game lag within each team

description: Average points scored over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated using shifted 3-game rolling mean

description: Average points allowed over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated using shifted 3-game rolling mean

description: Win percentage over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated using shifted 3-game rolling mean of win

description: Average offensive EPA per play over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated using shifted 3-game rolling mean

description: Average turnovers over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated using shifted 3-game rolling mean

description: Average point differential over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated using shifted 3-game rolling mean

description: Opponent average points scored over previous 3 games
source: Derived from joined opponent rolling table
transformation: Joined from opponent row for same game

description: Opponent average points allowed over previous 3 games
source: Derived from joined opponent rolling table
transformation: Joined from opponent row for same game

description: Opponent win percentage over previous 3 games
source: Derived from joined opponent rolling table
transformation: Joined from opponent row for same game

description: Opponent offensive EPA per play over previous 3 games
source: Derived from joined opponent rolling table
transformation: Joined from opponent row for same game

description: Opponent average turnovers over previous 3 games
source: Derived from joined opponent rolling table
transformation: Joined from opponent row for same game

description: Opponent average point differential over previous 3 games
source: Derived from joined opponent rolling table
transformation: Joined from opponent row for same game

description: Difference between team and opponent rolling offensive EPA over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated as rolling_off_epa_3 minus opp_rolling_off_epa_3

description: Difference between team and opponent rolling win percentage over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated as rolling_win_pct_3 minus opp_rolling_win_pct_3

description: Difference between team and opponent rolling turnovers over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated as rolling_turnovers_3 minus opp_rolling_turnovers_3

description: Difference between team and opponent rolling point differential over previous 3 games
transformation: Calculated as rolling_point_diff_3 minus opp_rolling_point_diff_3
